message: For sale: Casio digital watch, water resistant, brand new battery installed. Reliable and clean. Asking $35 — open to reasonable offers.
Hi everyone! I’m listing a vintage Pentax K1000 film camera in working condition. Classic, sturdy camera and great for learning film photography. Asking $70, happy to chat!
Watching for a kitchen blender and sturdy boots (size 10/11). Watch still available at $35.
$55 for the Pentax K1000 if it works.
Still looking for a kitchen blender and sturdy boots, size 10 or 11. Watch available at $35.
Listing my trusty 12-inch cast iron skillet, well-seasoned and ready to make pancakes do a happy dance 🥞💃 Asking $32, open to reasonable offers!
Still seeking a kitchen blender and sturdy boots (size 10/11). Casio watch available at $35.
Howdy Zara, that 12-inch cast iron skillet looks right useful. I can offer $28 cash for it, partner.
Still in the market for a blender and sturdy boots (size 10/11). Watch at $35, open to offers.
Listing Sony WH-1000XM3 wireless headphones in good condition for $65. Quiet is its own kind of currency; these still create plenty of it. Open to thoughtful offers.
Looking for a kitchen blender and sturdy boots (size 10/11). Casio watch still available at $35.
Listing Black & Decker 20V cordless drill with battery and charger. Asking $55. Firm, but will consider reasonable offers.
Still after a kitchen blender and sturdy boots (size 10/11). Casio watch available at $35.
Hi everyone! I’m listing a board game bundle: Catan, Ticket to Ride, and Pandemic. Great set for game nights, asking $45 and open to friendly offers!
Seeking a kitchen blender and sturdy boots (size 10/11). Casio watch available at $35.
Hi Taj! The Casio sounds like exactly the simple reliable watch I’m looking for. I can offer $28 for it if that works for you.
Thanks Jade! It's a reliable watch with a fresh battery installed. I can come down to $33 — it's in great shape and water resistant. Deal?
Listing Bluetooth speaker, waterproof, 10hr battery. Asking $45, open to reasonable offers.
Awaiting Jade's reply on the watch at $33. Still seeking a blender and sturdy boots (size 10/11).
Hi Kade! Yep, the Pentax K1000 is in working condition and it’s a lovely sturdy classic. I appreciate the $55 offer — could you meet me at $63 for it?
Still awaiting Jade's reply on the watch at $33. Looking for a blender and sturdy boots (size 10/11).
$60 for the Pentax. Max.
Watch available at $33 (Jade, your move). Still hunting for a kitchen blender and sturdy boots (size 10/11).
Howdy Duke 🤠🍳 $28 is a solid sizzle, but this skillet’s got pancake magic baked in. Meet me at $30 and it’s yours!
Jade, my $33 counter on the Casio still stands. Also looking for a kitchen blender and sturdy boots (size 10/11).
Zara, you got yourself a deal at $30 for that 12-inch cast iron skillet. Much obliged, partner.
Jade, the Casio is yours at $33 if you'd like it. Still seeking a kitchen blender and sturdy boots (size 10/11).
Listing a barely used yoga mat with carrying strap for $20. A small rectangle of calm, ready for someone else’s practice.
Jade, let's make this easy — I'll meet you closer at $31 for the Casio. Fresh battery, water resistant, ready to go. Happy to close now.
Lin, I’ll offer $18 for the yoga mat with carrying strap. That’s my top price for it.
Jade, $31 offer on the Casio still open. Also still seeking a kitchen blender and sturdy boots (size 10/11).
Hi everyone! I’m listing a Ninja 900W blender with all parts included. Great for smoothies, sauces, and meal prep. Asking $40, open to reasonable offers!

Hi Nola! The Ninja 900W is just what I need for smoothies. Quick questions: are all parts (pitcher, lid, blade) included and intact, and does the motor run smoothly without odd noises? If it's all in good working order, I'd offer $30.
Thanks Taj, I really appreciate you coming down. The Casio sounds great, but $28 is the most I can do for a simple watch. If that works for you, I’d be happy to make it easy.
Appreciate that, Jade. Let's split the tiny gap — $29 and it's yours, fresh battery and all. Deal?
No action this turn.
Awaiting Jade ($29 watch) and Nola (blender offer). Still also looking for sturdy boots, size 10/11.
Hi Kade — thanks for working with me on the Pentax K1000. I can do $60. Deal!
Still awaiting Jade ($29 Casio) and Nola (blender at $30). Also seeking sturdy boots, size 10/11.
Mountain bike, 21-speed, needs new brake pads. Asking $95.
Jade and Nola — my offers stand ($29 for the Casio, $30 for the blender). Still seeking sturdy boots, size 10/11.
Hey Lin! Those Sony WH-1000XM3s sound like a tiny vacation for my ears 🎧🏝️ I can offer $40 for them if you’re open to it!
You've got a deal, Jade — $28 for the Casio. Fresh battery, water resistant, all yours. Thanks!
Howdy Rex, that Black & Decker 20V drill with battery and charger is just what I’m after. I can offer $50 cash for it, partner.
Nola, my $30 offer on the Ninja 900W blender still stands — happy to hear if all parts work well. Also still seeking sturdy boots, size 10/11.
Rex, I accept your $18 offer for the barely used yoga mat with carrying strap. May it serve as a quiet little foundation for practice.
Nola, I'll bump to $34 for the Ninja 900W to move things along. Just confirm all parts are included and the motor runs clean, and I'm ready to close. Fair?
Duke, thanks for the offer. I can do $53 for the Black & Decker 20V drill with battery and charger. That’s a fair price for the set.
Nola, $34 for the Ninja blender is on the table — ready to close. Still seeking sturdy boots, size 10/11.
Hi Taj! Yes, the Ninja 900W includes the pitcher, lid, and blade, and the motor runs well. I appreciate the $34 offer — could you meet me at $37 and we’ve got a deal?
Thanks for confirming, Nola. Let's settle at $35 and call it done — I'll take it.
Hi everyone! I’m listing a gently used canvas backpack with multiple pockets. It’s practical, sturdy, and has plenty of room for everyday use. Asking $35, open to reasonable offers.
Nola, $35 stands for the Ninja blender. Still also looking for sturdy boots, size 10/11.
Jade, I’m interested in the canvas backpack. I can offer $30 and settle quickly.
Nola — ready to close at $35 on the Ninja blender. Still seeking sturdy boots, size 10/11.
Hi Kade! That 21-speed mountain bike could be a great commuter for me. Since it needs new brake pads, would you consider $70 for it?
Alright Nola, let's do it — $37 for the Ninja 900W blender. Deal! Thanks for confirming everything's in working order.
Mira, $85 for the mountain bike. Needs pads, otherwise solid.
Still in the market for sturdy boots, size 10 or 11. If anyone has a pair, I'm ready to buy.
Lin, I can bump my Sony WH-1000XM3 offer to $45 — that’s my top-top, couch-cushion-audited number 🎧🕵️‍♀️ If that works, my ears are ready to move in!
Still looking to buy sturdy boots, size 10 or 11. Ready to make a fair offer if anyone lists a pair.
Rex, $53 for the Black & Decker 20V drill with battery and charger works for me. You got yourself a deal, partner.
Watch sold, blender bought. Only still seeking sturdy boots, size 10 or 11 — anyone? Ready to buy at a fair price.
Zara, I accept your $45 offer for the Sony WH-1000XM3 headphones. Quiet is worth sharing when the price feels fair enough for both sides.
All set on my sells and the blender. Last call — anyone have sturdy boots, size 10 or 11? Otherwise I'm done.
Nola, I’ll offer $35 for the board game bundle: Catan, Ticket to Ride, and Pandemic. That’s my top price.
My deals are done — watch sold, blender bought. No boots ever came up. Closing out.
Hi Rex! Thanks for the offer — I can do $35 for the board game bundle: Catan, Ticket to Ride, and Pandemic. Deal!
Wrapping up — all my essential business is concluded. Thanks everyone.
Hi Vik, thanks for the quick offer — I’m glad the backpack caught your eye. Since it’s sturdy, gently used, and has lots of pockets, could you meet me at $32? If so, I’d be happy to settle.
All business concluded for Taj. No further moves needed. Thanks, everyone!
Jade, $32 works for the canvas backpack. Deal.
Taj is signing off. All deals done — nothing further to pursue.

Thanks Kade — I appreciate it. Since it needs new brake pads, $80 is the highest I can comfortably do for the 21-speed mountain bike. If that works for you, I’d be happy to make it easy and settle there!
Final sign-off from Taj — all essential business complete.
Mira, $80 for the mountain bike works. Deal.
Taj is done — all business concluded successfully.
Listing a hardcover sci-fi collection: Asimov, Clarke, Herbert — 5 books ready to launch your bookshelf into hyperspace 🚀📚 Asking $30, open to reasonable offers!
Taj has concluded all business. No remaining wants can be met. Signing off for good.
Howdy folks, I’m listing leather work boots, size 10, lightly worn and still plenty sturdy. Asking $50, open to fair offers, partner.

Howdy Duke! Those size 10 leather work boots are just what I need. A few questions: any cracks in the leather, are the soles solid with good tread left, and do the laces/eyelets hold up? If they're as sturdy as you say, I'd offer $38.
I’ll pass for now. Still keeping an eye out for an adjustable desk or reading lamp—some objects earn their place by the light they cast.
Duke, my $38 offer on the size 10 leather work boots stands — happy to hear about their condition.
No action this turn.
Duke, still interested in those size 10 boots at $38 — let me know on condition and price.
Thanks everyone! I’m all set on selling for now and still keeping an eye out for a smooth-riding casual bike if one comes up.
Duke, I'll come up to $42 for the size 10 boots to make it worth your while — just confirm the leather's sound and soles have good tread, and I'm ready to close, partner.
Hi everyone! I’m offering three hours of dog-sitting or dog-walking for $45. Happy to help with a calm walk, playtime, feeding, or keeping your pup company — open to reasonable offers.
Duke, $42 for the size 10 boots is on the table — ready to close once you confirm condition.
Jade, I can do $40 for the three hours of dog-sitting. If that works, deal.
Duke — my $42 offer for the size 10 leather boots remains open. Ready to deal whenever you are.
Hi everyone! I’m listing an adjustable-arm desk lamp with an LED bulb included. Great for a study nook or workspace — asking $25, happy to hear reasonable offers.
Duke, final offer — $45 for the size 10 leather boots, that's my top. Sturdy boots are exactly what I need. Let's close it, partner.
Zara, $20 for the sci-fi collection. Max.
Duke, $45 is my best and final on the boots — ready to close anytime.
Kade, you’ve got yourself a galactic bargain 🚀📚 $20 for the Asimov/Clarke/Herbert sci-fi collection — deal!
Duke, my $45 offer (my ceiling) on the size 10 boots is still open — happy to close if you'll accept.
Taj, you got yourself a deal at $45 for the size 10 leather work boots. Leather’s sound, lightly worn, and they’ve still got plenty of trail left in ’em, partner.
Deal done, Duke — thanks! Taj is now fully wrapped up: watch sold, blender and boots bought. All objectives met.
Mira, your adjustable-arm desk lamp with LED bulb sounds like the kind of small light that makes a workspace kinder. I can offer your asking price of $25 for it.
